overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through lush countryside. The character travels from a dense forest area toward a distant stone castle, passing vineyard walls and encountering NPCs resting along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with dappled sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path toward distant castle towers visible through the trees

entered.detail: tall trees forming a dense canopy overhead with dappled sunlight filtering through
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest undergrowth
tall stone castle towers visible on the horizon through the forest clearing

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense forest with tall trees forming a canopy overhead. The dirt path winds through lush green undergrowth with a distant castle visible on the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path alongside stone vineyard wall

events.description: exits dense forest into open countryside with stone wall and vineyard appearing on right

agents.ego_description: continuing along path with stone wall and grape vines now on the right side

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path with weathered gray stones
rows of grape vines growing on trellises behind the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal rolling countryside with a low stone wall running alongside the path. Vineyard rows are visible behind the wall while the distant castle towers grow larger on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path with vineyard boundary

events.description: two NPC figures appear sitting on the stone wall to the right
yellow flower gathering prompt appears briefly in lower left indicating interactive herbs

agents.ego_description: walking past NPCs resting on the wall while approaching flowering plants along the path

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting and standing on the stone wall watching the path

entered.detail: two human figures resting on top of the stone wall
cluster of yellow and orange wildflowers with game interaction prompt

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes by villagers resting on the stone wall as he continues through the open meadow. Brief interactive prompts for gathering herbs appear in the foreground as he walks past flowering plants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from the enclosure of a dense forest into an expansive, sunlit countryside. It begins beneath a canopy of tall trees, following a winding dirt path through lush green undergrowth with a distant castle visible on the horizon. As the forest opens up, the scenery shifts to rolling hills where a low stone wall and rows of vineyards line the path, causing the castle towers to grow larger in the distance. The scene then expands into an open meadow, passing villagers resting along the wall and flowering plants in the foreground before continuing toward the looming fortress.
